section_miscategorizations.reason: This directly contradicts multiple other subjective pain statements in the same section; while still subjective content, the internal inconsistency could mislead but is more a documentation quality issue than a section misplacement.
This is technically an objective anatomic statement, but it is trivial and non-clinical; it does not belong meaningfully in any SOAP section, though its presence in O is not strictly incorrect.
This describes an existing medication regimen rather than a new order or change; per instructions, current medications belong in the Subjective section unless framed as a treatment change.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is taking blood pressure medicine.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is current medication state, not a new prescription or change; it should be documented in the Subjective section per the template rules.
